strengths: Strong technical stack: SQL, Python, ETL
Experience with AI tools including Claude
Quantified impact on acquisition and efficiency
weaknesses: Limited explicit paid media campaign analysis
No documented A/B testing or formal attribution work
Limited CRM tool variety beyond Salesforce
Unclear experience with MMM and advanced attribution
Few explicit examples of Claude API/Model Context Protocol integration
improvement_bullets: Optimized marketing performance by tracking CAC, LTV, and conversion rates across paid media campaigns, utilizing Google Sheets and SQL to identify key growth loops.
Led A/B testing initiatives and multi-touch attribution analysis to evaluate channel ROI, resulting in refined budget allocation strategies.
Engineered custom AI workflows by leveraging Claude APIs and prompt engineering to automate real-time CRM performance monitoring and extraction of consumer insights.
Acted as the lead analytics bridge for external SEO agencies, utilizing Google Search Console data to validate performance metrics against internal databases.
Designed and maintained automated Marketing Mix Modeling (MMM) frameworks and real-time dashboards to provide the growth team with granular visibility into campaign effectiveness.
cover_letter: Hiring Manager, Success Academy Charter Schools, New York, NY. Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Senior Analyst, Marketing opportunity with Success Academy Charter Schools. I am interested in this opportunity because of Success Academy’s commitment to providing a rigorous, high-quality education to every child regardless of zip code. What interests me about working for Success Academy is its rapid growth and data-centric culture, which intrigues me because it aligns perfectly with my background in scaling operational efficiency and using advanced analytics to drive acquisition. I believe my expertise in technical data modeling and my passion for pioneering AI-driven workflows would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached complex data challenges with a focus on automation and actionable intelligence. In fact, while at Shine Masters, I identified that manual reporting was a bottleneck to growth; I built an end-to-end automated pipeline using Power BI and Python that reduced processing time by 40% and enabled a 300% increase in new customer acquisition through data-informed marketing targeting. Ultimately, I know that the Senior Analyst, Marketing role at Success Academy would allow me to bring my advanced data visualization skills to key responsibilities like attribution insight and growth loop identification. Additionally, my role as a Data Analyst at Shine Masters enabled me to develop my CRM and performance analysis skills. I collaborated with cross-functional teams to integrate Salesforce data with marketing performance metrics, allowing for a precise calculation of customer segments and conversion drivers that directly influenced our quarterly budget allocations. I’m excited by the opportunity to use my AI-integration skills in working on the next generation of marketing analytics at Success Academy. I know that my technical foundation in SQL and Python and my proactive approach to AI prompt engineering align with what it takes to succeed at the Senior Analyst, Marketing role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
